single_runner_caveat: Single rater (Claude). Public API + commit history evidence only — no test execution, no internal-implementation reading, no multi-rater consensus. See triage-rubric.md for full caveats.

decisions.summary: exp(_:) × log(_:) — canonical principal-branch inverse pair (cycle-17 #5 accept rate-stability; V1.21.C canonicalInversePairs allowlist preserved)
cos(_:) × acos(_:) — canonical inverse (cycle-17 #9 accept)
sin(_:) × asin(_:) — canonical inverse (cycle-17 #10 accept)
tan(_:) × atan(_:) — canonical inverse (cycle-17 #11 accept)
expMinusOne(_:) × log(onePlus:) — accurate-near-zero numerical-variant pair preserved by V1.21.C canonicalInversePairs allowlist
_value(forBucketContents:) (UInt64) -> Int? × _bucketContents(for:) (Int?) -> UInt64 — codec (cycle-14 #1 / cycle-17 #1 accept rate-stability)

index(after:) (Int) -> Int × _minimumCapacity(forScale:) (Int) -> Int — asymmetric cross-pair (one direction-labeled, one domain-marker-labeled); unrelated functions on same Int domain; cycle-19 finding asymmetric class first measurement
index(after:) × _maximumCapacity(forScale:) — same asymmetric class as #7
index(after:) × _scale(forCapacity:) — same asymmetric class
index(before:) × _minimumCapacity(forScale:) — mirror of #7
_minimumCapacity(forScale:) × _maximumCapacity(forScale:) — both forward capacity-from-scale, not codec; min(scale(c)) × max(scale(c)) yields different capacities
_description(type:) (String) -> String — formatter wraps input in structural format (cycle-17 #16 reject rate-stability)
firstOccupiedBucketInChain(with:) (Bucket) -> Bucket — bucket-chain seek; idempotence on already-occupied input is internal-state dependent (cycle-17 #17 unknown rate-stability)
_minimumCapacity(forScale:) (Int) -> Int — capacity is a function of scale; capacity(capacity(s)) ≠ capacity(s) (capacity-of-capacity is meaningless; type-shape coincidence)
bucket(after:) (Bucket) -> Bucket — direction op (advance); bucket(after(b)) = next-next, not idempotent
wordCount(forScale:) (Int) -> Int — word-count is a function of scale; same shape-coincidence reject as #14
nearMissLines(_:) ([String]?) -> [String]? — formatter (cycle-17 #21 unknown rate-stability)
format(_:) (CheckResult) -> String — formatter wraps enum into String; format(format(s)) (re-format) is meaningless and likely produces structurally-different output
index(_:offsetBy:) — directional first-arg vs second-arg (cycle-17 #22 reject rate-stability)
-(z:w:) — subtraction, anti-commutative (cycle-17 #23 reject)
_relaxedAdd(_:_:) — relaxed-precision addition, abstractly commutative (cycle-17 #24 accept)
index(_:offsetBy:) — Int offset addition is associative (cycle-17 #25 accept)
/(z:w:) — division, non-associative (cycle-17 #26 reject)
_relaxedMul(_:_:) — relaxed-precision multiplication, abstractly associative (cycle-17 #27 accept)
_minimumCapacity(forScale:) — capacity-from-scale, monotonic (cycle-17 #28 accept)
index(after:) — strictly monotonic Int+1 (cycle-17 #29 accept)
sizeOfChunk(offset:) — query-based size lookup, non-linear in offset (cycle-17 #30 reject)
walkCap(for:) — collection-bounded count, monotonic in collection size (cycle-17 #31 accept)
bucket(after:) × bucket(before:) — direction-pair on Bucket; both forward, not inverses (cycle-17 #33 reject)
word(after:) × word(before:) — same direction-pair shape as #29 (NEW v1.22 sample on different file)
rescaledDivide(_:_:) × Complex.zero — division by zero is undefined; cycle-6/14/17 #34 reject rate-stability across all 4 cycles
OrderedSet.formUnion × union — canonical SetAlgebra dual (cycle-17 #35 accept rate-stability; V1.18.C 100% by-construction precision)
OrderedSet.formIntersection × intersection — canonical SetAlgebra dual (cycle-17 #36 accept)
OrderedSet.formSymmetricDifference × symmetricDifference — canonical SetAlgebra dual (cycle-17 #37 accept)
OrderedSet.subtract × subtracting — SetAlgebra dual (active/-ing rule; cycle-17 #38 accept)
OrderedDictionary.merge × merging — Swift dict merging convention (cycle-17 #39 accept)
lifted: OrderedSet._isUnique() — internal CoW uniqueness check; calling twice on already-unique storage is no-op (cycle-17 #44 accept rate-stability)
lifted: OrderedSet._regenerateHashTable() — rebuild from scratch, terminal mutator (cycle-17 #45 accept)
lifted: OrderedDictionary.sort() — sorting twice = sorting once (sorted is fixed point under default Comparable); idempotent

lifted: OrderedDictionary.shuffle() — non-deterministic; SwiftInfer's body-detector should have vetoed via nonDeterministicVeto but the suggestion surfaced; rater can't determine why veto missed without source inspection of OrderedDictionary internals
lifted: OrderedDictionary.reverse() — reverse(reverse(s)) = s ≠ reverse(s) generally; not idempotent (only idempotent on palindromes)
lifted: OrderedDictionary.removeFirst() — state advances per call; not idempotent
lifted: OrderedDictionary.removeLast() — same shape as #42; state advances
lifted: OrderedSet.sort() — same shape as #39; sort is fixed-point idempotent
lifted: OrderedSet.reverse() — same shape as #41; not idempotent
lifted: _HashTable.BucketIterator.advance(until: Int) — monotone-bounded (cycle-17 #46 reject rate-stability; V1.21.B Strong → Likely demotion didn't change underlying mathematical relation)
